responses:
theorem P2_imp_P1_and_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : P2 A) : P1 A ∧ P3 A := by
  constructor
  · intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hx
    exact (Set.interior_subset) hx'
  · intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hx
    have hsub : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
      have : interior A ⊆ A := Set.interior_subset
      exact Set.closure_mono this
    exact (Set.interior_mono hsub) hx'

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro hA
  have hcl : closure (interior (A : Set X)) ⊆ closure A := by
    have : interior A ⊆ A := interior_subset
    exact closure_mono this
  have hint : interior (closure (interior (A : Set X))) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    interior_mono hcl
  exact subset_trans hA hint
